ogTitle: Chilcotts Creek vs Chillingham: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Chilcotts Creek and Chillingham.
heading: Chilcotts Creek vs Chillingham — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Chilcotts Creek, New South Wales and Chillingham, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Chilcotts Creek has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Chillingham (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Chilcotts Creek or Chillingham safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Chilcotts Creek has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Chillingham scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Chilcotts Creek scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Chillingham scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Chilcotts Creek or Chillingham?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Chilcotts Creek has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
